basics.name: Kartikey Gupta
basics.title: Full-Stack Developer
basics.tagline: Performance Architect. 6+ Years Shipping at Scale.
basics.summary: Full-Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web and mobile applications. Proficient in Node.js, Python, React, SQL, AWS, and RESTful APIs, with a strong focus on performance optimization, security, and user experience. Proven track record of leading teams, delivering robust backend systems, and creating intuitive front-end interfaces.

impact.label: Testing Time Reduced
impact.description: Automated REST API testing at FIS Global

impact.label: ETL Data Accuracy
impact.description: SQL–Salesforce sync tool at FIS Global

highlights: Developed and optimized a scalable Admin & Support Portal for OS management, migrating the backend from Python to Node.js for better performance and scalability
Implemented multi-tiered access controls and built intuitive React interfaces, resulting in a 40% increase in portal usage
Built a Python-based automation tool for log analysis & monitoring, reducing manual debugging time by 50%
Optimized backend APIs to cut response times by 30% through query optimization
Used custom hooks, Context API, memoization, and lazy loading for smoother workflows

experience.tagline: Building for web, mobile, and wearables
highlights: Developed web, mobile, and smartwatch applications using ReactJS, React Native, and Node.js, improving performance by 25%
Applied advanced React patterns — Redux, Context API, custom hooks, memoization — for scalable, high-quality code
Led a team of 3 developers, conducting code reviews, mentoring juniors, and establishing architecture standards
Resolved critical bugs, memory leaks, and security vulnerabilities, reducing bug reports by 35% and enhancing system reliability
Built an automation testing framework covering 100% of REST APIs, reducing manual API testing time by 80%
Developed an ETL tool to sync data between multiple SQL databases and Salesforce, improving accuracy by 95%
Streamlined data synchronization pipelines while maintaining and enhancing existing business applications
Ensured higher test coverage, reliability, and scalability across enterprise systems
